description: ENA NS 39.2: Accounts in Ladino in western Arabic numerals dated on the verso most likely as 28 Nisan [54]92 or 23 April 1732. The accounting format on the recto is orderly and may be a fragment from a broader commercial ledger. The dated passage on the verso might not be directly associated with the recto yet is in the same hand and offers useful information on the coinage involved: "mayedes / מאיידיס" or Ottoman silver medin. The last two lines of the verso also mention an unknown commodity related to cloth that can be transliterated as "crisales de panyo" or alternatively "carisales de panyo." MCD.
description_he: ENA NS 39.2: חשבונות בלאדינו במספרים ערביים מערביים, מתוארכים ל-28 ניסן [54]92 או 23 באפריל 1732. משתמש במדין כסף עות'מאני. MCD.
